channel.title: rami.io GmbH — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by rami.io GmbH (rami.io).

item.title: CVE-2026-13602 · 7.7 HIGH — Session takeover vulnerability
item.description: We found a chain of combining multiple weaknesses in the product that could allow an attacker to become any user in the backend and access any data: * The payment integration plugins Stripe (included in the core system), pretix-mollie, pretix-oppwa,…

item.title: CVE-2026-13603 · 9 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SSRF with API key leak in pretix-oppwa
item.description: The payment integration pretix-oppwa provides support for the payment providers VR Payment, Hobex, and potentially others based on Oppwa's technology. The integration of Oppwa, following their official documentation, includes a step where the user is…

item.title: CVE-2026-13350 · 2.3 LOW
item.description: Permissions where checked incorrectly during room creation, allowing attackers to create rooms of types they shouldn't be allowed to create.

item.title: CVE-2026-57532 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: Malicious HTML content contained in the layout specification of a PDF ticket or badge layout was executed when the PDF editor is opened in the browser. This could allow one backend user to inject JavaScript into the browser context of another backend…

item.title: CVE-2026-57533 · 2.1 LOW
item.description: Malicious HTML content could be injected into the page pretix shows when redirection to an untrusted page occurs. Since this page has a Content-Security-Policy, this can mainly be used for phishing purposes.

item.title: CVE-2026-57535 · 2.1 LOW
item.description: Content injected to PDF rendering contexts could, in many places, include HTML content including tags. If the src attribute of these images pointed to an URL, the PDF rendering engine would download the image from that place and display it, the…

item.title: CVE-2026-13225 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Stored XSS in ticket confirmation page
item.description: Malicious HTML content could be injected into the email address of an order, which pretix showed without sanitization on the confirmation page for individual tickets in that order.

item.title: CVE-2026-57534 · 2.1 LOW — Stored XSS in pretix-pages
item.description: Malicious HTML content could be injected into the content of a page in the pretix-pages plugin.

item.title: CVE-2026-57536 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Insufficient validation of payment status in pretix-mollie
item.description: Our payment integration with Mollie did not properly validate payment status responses. An attacker could use a successful payment status response from one payment and supply it to the system for a different payment, gaining access to multiple valid…

item.title: CVE-2026-13222 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Insufficient validation of payment status in pretix-oppwa
item.description: Our payment integration with Oppwa-based payment methods did not properly validate payment status responses. An attacker could use a successful payment status response from one payment and supply it to the system for a different payment, gaining acce…

item.title: CVE-2026-13223 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Insufficient validation of payment status in pretix-computop
item.description: Our payment integration with Computop-based payment methods did not properly validate payment status responses. An attacker could use a successful payment status response from one payment and supply it to the system for a different payment, gaining a…

item.title: CVE-2026-13314 · 2 LOW — Stored XSS in pretix-digital
item.description: Malicious HTML content could be injected into the content rendered by the pretix-digital plugin.

item.title: CVE-2026-12863 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Open redirect
item.description: An unvalidated redirect was contained in Venueless' social login functionality and could be exploited for phishing using trusted domains.

item.title: CVE-2026-11764 · 3.6 LOW — Data exposed without proper permission
item.description: When creating an export of all reusable media, the secrets of connected gift cards were included in the export even if the user creating the export does not have permission to view gift cards. This is inconsistent with the UI and API where only the f…

item.title: CVE-2026-9712 · 3.8 LOW — Insecure direct object reference
item.description: When creating an export through the pretix API, API clients are returned an UUID value for their export job (a long, random string like 35742818-c375-4d15-839f-d49aecce94d6). Using this UUID, the API client can then request the actual file for downlo…

item.title: CVE-2026-5600 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: A new API endpoint introduced in pretix 2025 that is supposed to return all check-in events of a specific event in fact returns all check-in events belonging to the respective organizer. This allows an API consumer to access information for all other…

item.title: CVE-2026-5599 · 7.3 HIGH — API allows deletion of users of other instance
item.description: A user with API access and "manage users" permission in any venueless world is able to trigger deletion of user accounts in other worlds.

item.title: CVE-2026-4982 · 7.3 HIGH — Unauthorized access to chat contents
item.description: A user with permission "update world" in any Venueless world is able to exfiltrate chat messages from direct messages or channels in other worlds on the same server due to a bug in the reporting feature. The exploitability is limited by the fact that…

item.title: CVE-2026-2452 · 7.5 HIGH — Unsafe variable evaluation in email templates
item.description: Emails sent by pretix can utilize placeholders that will be filled with customer data. For example, when {name} is used in an email template, it will be replaced with the buyer's name for the final email. This mechanism contained a security-relevant…

item.title: CVE-2026-2451 · 7.5 HIGH — Unsafe variable evaluation in email templates
item.description: Emails sent by pretix can utilize placeholders that will be filled with customer data. For example, when {name} is used in an email template, it will be replaced with the buyer's name for the final email. This mechanism contained a security-relevant…

item.title: CVE-2026-2415 · 7.5 HIGH — Unsafe variable evaluation in email templates
item.description: Emails sent by pretix can utilize placeholders that will be filled with customer data. For example, when {name} is used in an email template, it will be replaced with the buyer's name for the final email. This mechanism contained two security-relevan…

item.title: CVE-2025-14881 · 3.8 LOW — Insecure direct object reference
item.description: Multiple API endpoints allowed access to sensitive files from other users by knowing the UUID of the file that were not intended to be accessible by UUID only.

item.title: CVE-2025-14882 · 3.8 LOW — Insecure direct object reference
item.description: An API endpoint allowed access to sensitive files from other users by knowing the UUID of the file that were not intended to be accessible by UUID only.

item.title: CVE-2025-13742 · 2.4 LOW 🌩️ — Limited HTML injection in emails
item.description: Emails sent by pretix can utilize placeholders that will be filled with customer data. For example, when {name} is used in an email template, it will be replaced with the buyer's name for the final email. If the name of the attendee contained HTML or…

item.title: CVE-2024-9575 · 8.5 HIGH — Local File Inclusion in pretix-widget WordPress plugin
item.description: Local File Inclusion vulnerability in pretix Widget WordPress plugin pretix-widget on Windows allows PHP Local File Inclusion. This issue affects pretix Widget WordPress plugin: from 1.0.0 through 1.0.5.

item.title: CVE-2024-8113 · 7.2 HIGH — Stored XSS in Placeholder Samples in Mail Preview
item.description: Stored XSS in organizer and event settings of pretix up to 2024.7.0 allows malicious event organizers to inject HTML tags into e-mail previews on settings page. The default Content Security Policy of pretix prevents execution of attacker-provided scr…
